publicTitle: Migration, Nationality and Sexual-Offence Data — Source Status
publicSummary: This file does not claim a single settled cross-country figure. It tells the site which official source lanes must be checked before any sexual-offence, nationality, asylum, migration-background, arrest, charge, conviction, or victim figure is shown as settled.
policy: Do not treat nationality as immigration status. Do not mix suspects, arrests, charges, convictions, victims, foreign-born status, citizenship, asylum status, undocumented status, and unknown status. Use per-capita context where the official source supports it. If official migrant-status data is unavailable, show SOURCE SPLIT REQUIRED rather than inventing a number.
readerWarning: Sexual-offence data is politically and legally sensitive. The public dashboard must name the source, date checked, population category, legal category, and whether the figure is report, suspect, charge, conviction, or survey-based before using any number.
dashboardStatus: Source review active — do not publish unsourced or mixed-category percentages as settled facts.

countries.whatToCheck: Police-recorded sexual offences, court outcomes, suspect nationality where published, immigration/asylum status only where officially recorded, and victimisation survey context.
countries.sourceLabel: ONS / Home Office / MoJ / police force data / courts
countries.publicNote: UK datasets often separate offence reports, prosecutions, convictions, nationality, and immigration status imperfectly. Do not merge those categories.

countries.whatToCheck: Sexual-offence datasets, suspect nationality where published, court outcomes, residence status if available, and unknown-status cases.
countries.sourceLabel: SSMSI / Ministry of Interior / Justice Ministry / courts
countries.publicNote: Do not infer migration status from nationality alone. Show unknown-status limits clearly.

countries.whatToCheck: Police crime statistics by suspect nationality, asylum/refugee categories where published, convictions, victims, and per-capita context.
countries.sourceLabel: BKA PKS / Federal Interior Ministry / courts
countries.publicNote: Separate Tatverdächtige/suspects from convictions. Suspect nationality is not the same as immigration status.

countries.whatToCheck: Sexual-offence data, suspect origin/status where official sources publish it, conviction data, victimisation surveys, and unknown-status warnings.
countries.publicNote: Show whether figures are reported offences, suspects, convictions, or survey results.

countries.whatToCheck: Sexual-violence reports, suspect nationality/status where available, conviction data, irregular-migration category if officially measured, and per-capita warnings.
countries.sourceLabel: ISTAT / Interior Ministry / Justice Ministry / courts
countries.publicNote: Do not present nationality tables as migrant-status tables unless the source explicitly supports it.

countries.whatToCheck: Sexual-offence reports, suspect nationality where published, residence/immigration-status data where official, court outcomes, and unknown-status cases.
countries.sourceLabel: INE / Interior Ministry / judiciary / police datasets
countries.publicNote: Use official category labels exactly and explain unknown status.

countries.whatToCheck: Sexual-offence reports, suspect migration-background categories where official, nationality/status separation, convictions, and per-capita context.
countries.publicNote: Migration background, nationality, citizenship, and residence status are not interchangeable.

countries.whatToCheck: Official sexual-offence reports, suspect nationality/status where available, prosecution/conviction outcomes, and unknown-status limits.
countries.publicNote: Use caution with fragmented federal/regional data.

countries.whatToCheck: Sexual-offence statistics, suspect nationality, asylum/refugee categories where official, convictions, and per-capita context.
countries.sourceLabel: BMI crime statistics / courts / statistics office
countries.publicNote: Suspect category, conviction category, and asylum/refugee category must be separated.

countries.whatToCheck: Sexual-assault arrest/conviction data only where immigration status is officially recorded. Separate undocumented status, foreign-born status, nationality, citizenship, and unknown status.
countries.sourceLabel: FBI NIBRS / BJS / DHS / state courts
countries.publicNote: Most US criminal datasets do not consistently include immigration status. Do not invent it.
